## TextNode class

An AST node containing literal text with regular expression syntax escaped.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class TextNode extends RegexNode 
```
**Extends:** [RegexNode](./pattern-builder.regexnode.md)

## Example


```ts
new TextNode("a.b").toString(); // "a\\.b"
```
